journal_entry.description: Acquisition of 10% equity investment in Ford under equity method
journal_entry.rationale: BlackRock acquired 10% of Ford's common shares with significant influence, requiring equity method accounting under IAS 28. The investment in associate increases by the purchase price plus directly attributable transaction costs ($3,000,000 + $100,000). Cash decreases by the total amount paid. Under IAS 28, transaction costs are capitalized as part of the investment cost.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Equity method investment acquisition: Investment in Associate (asset) increases by purchase price plus transaction costs ($3.1M), Cash (asset) decreases by same amount. Transaction costs are capitalized under IAS 28 for equity method investments.
